title: Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Mini Roller Sleeves, 10 Sleeve Pack, 4"
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Mini Roller Sleeve 4in 10 Pack What's Included 1 x 10 pack replacement roller sleeves Doing a Project For use with a Harris 4 inch mini roller frame. Seriously Good replacement sleeves are for the Seriously Good 4" inch gloss mini roller set Foam sleeve gives a fine lint free finish, with less mess, when painting larger flat sections such as skirting boards, stair banisters, doors, furniture and window sills with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. For best results rub the sleeve with a clean hand before use to remove dust particles. Do not wet Doing a project? Don't forget... to get the same paint finish team your 4" Seriously Good Roller Sleeves with our range of Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Paint Brushes. These replacement sleeves do fit any Harris 4" roller frame. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
